name: Andy Biggs
stanceSummary: Biggs has taken a strongly pro-Israel security stance, repeatedly backing Israel's right to military self-defense and criticizing U.S. moves viewed as constraining Israeli operations. Combined with positive Israel-lobby funding totals, this dataset classifies him as Pro-Israel.

timeline.event: Biggs condemned rocket attacks on Israel and said he supports Israel's right to defend itself.
Biggs supported maintaining the U.S. embassy in Jerusalem and aligned with pro-Israel congressional efforts.
